item.name: Get The Status Of An Ingestion Job

AlphaSense's GraphQL-fronted Utility APIs covering Search, Companies, Brokers, Watchlist, Trends, User, Download / Export, and the REST Ingestion API used by Enterprise Intelligence customers. All GraphQL surfaces share the single /gql endpoint at api.alpha-sense.com and the same OAuth 2.0 + x-api-key authentication as the Agent API; the Ingestion API is REST under /services/i/ingestion-api/v1/. Documented at https://developer.alpha-sense.com/api/getting-started.
